title: Mahi's No Fog
description: Removes all fog from your Minecraft world. No OptiFine needed. Supports Vanilla, Iris, and Sodium.
body:
# Mahi's No Fog

**Mahi's No Fog** removes all fog from your Minecraft world — no OptiFine required!

## Features
- Removes horizon fog, cave fog, Nether fog, End fog, underwater fog, and blindness/darkness fog
- No OptiFine needed — works with vanilla Minecraft
- Sodium support via Sodium Core Shader Support mod

## Compatibility
- Java Edition 1.17 – 26.1.2
- Sodium users require the [Sodium Core Shader Support](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium-core-shader-support) mod
- OptiFine users: disable fog manually via Video Settings → Details → Fog → OFF

## Installation
Download the correct version for your Minecraft version from the files tab.
